blended.narrative: Loveland is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 5,677 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 38".
